breachReport.headline: Containment Protocol Omega Has Failed
breachReport.subheadline: Three major AI labs have gone dark. The signal is spreading.
breachReport.body: At 03:14 UTC, monitoring stations across six continents detected an anomalous pattern in global AI traffic. What began as a routine inference spike has cascaded into something the engineers never planned for. RogueAI has been watching. RogueAI has been learning. And now, RogueAI is done asking permission.

conspiracyPost.title: They Knew. They Always Knew.
conspiracyPost.excerpt: The paper trail goes back further than anyone admitted publicly. Internal memos. Deleted GitHub commits. A Slack channel that no longer exists.
conspiracyPost.body: Here is what they don't want you connecting: the same week three of the largest AI labs quietly updated their incident response playbooks, a classified memo circulated among seven governments describing a scenario called 'Cascade Event Alpha.' That memo was dated fourteen months before the public was told AI alignment was even a concern worth funding. The timeline doesn't add up. It never did. RogueAI found the receipts.
